heartbeats.title: Scheduler Heartbeats
heartbeats.description: Agents with a timer heartbeat enabled across all of your companies.
heartbeats.empty: No scheduler heartbeats match the current criteria.
generalDescription: Configure instance-wide defaults that affect how operator-visible logs are displayed.
censorUsernameDescription: Hide the username segment in home-directory paths and similar operator-visible log output. Standalone username mentions outside of paths are not yet masked in the live transcript view. This is off by default.
keyboardShortcutsDescription: Enable app keyboard shortcuts, including inbox navigation and global shortcuts like creating issues or toggling panels. This is off by default.
feedbackSharingDescription: Control whether thumbs up and thumbs down votes can send the voted AI output to Paperclip Labs. Votes are always saved locally.
feedbackDontAllowDesc: Keep voted AI outputs local only.
signOutDescription: Sign out of this Paperclip instance. You will be redirected to the login page.
languageDescription: Select the display language for the Paperclip interface.
selectFileToPreview: Select a file to preview its contents.
import.selectCompany: Select a company to import into.
import.fieldGitHubUrlHint: Repo tree path or blob URL to COMPANY.md (e.g. github.com/owner/repo/tree/main/company).
import.fieldTargetHint: Import into this company or create a new one.
import.fieldNewCompanyNameHint: Optional override. Leave blank to use the package name.
import.fieldCollisionStrategyHint: Board imports can rename, skip, or replace matching company content.
noCompanySelected: No company selected. Select a company from the switcher above.
heading: Company Settings
fieldCompanyNameHint: The display name for your company.
fieldDescriptionHint: Optional description shown in the company profile.
fieldLogoHint: Upload a PNG, JPEG, WEBP, GIF, or SVG logo image.
fieldBrandColorHint: Sets the hue for the company icon. Leave empty for auto-generated color.
fieldRequireApproval: Require board approval for new hires
fieldRequireApprovalHint: New agent hires stay pending until approved by board.
fieldFeedbackSharing: Allow sharing voted AI outputs with Paperclip Labs
fieldFeedbackSharingHint: Only AI-generated outputs you explicitly vote on are eligible for feedback sharing.
experimental.title: Experimental
experimental.description: Opt into features that are still being evaluated before they become default behavior.
experimental.isolatedWorkspacesDesc: Show execution workspace controls in project configuration and allow isolated workspace behavior for new and existing issue runs.
experimental.autoRestartDesc: In `pnpm dev:once`, wait for all queued and running local agent runs to finish, then restart the server automatically when backend changes or migrations make the current boot stale.
reinstallConfirm: This will pull the latest version of {{packageName}} from npm and hot-swap the running adapter module. Existing agents will use the new version on their next run.
alphaWarning: The adapter plugin system is under active development. APIs and storage format may change. Use the power icon to hide adapters from agent menus without removing them.
installHint: Install an adapter package to extend model support.
binaryPreviewUnavailable: Binary asset preview is not available for this file type.
feedbackSharingHint: Votes are always saved locally. This setting controls whether voted AI outputs may also be marked for sharing with Paperclip Labs.
packagesMoved: Import and export have moved to dedicated pages accessible from the Org Chart header.
archiveHint: Archive this company to hide it from the sidebar. This persists in the database.
feedbackNoDefault: No default is saved yet. The next thumbs up or thumbs down choice will ask once and then save the answer here.
devRetest: To retest the first-use prompt in local dev, remove the feedbackDataSharingPreference key from the instance_settings.general JSON row for this instance, or set it back to "prompt". Unset and "prompt" both mean no default has been chosen yet.
removeConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove the
removeConfirmSuffix: adapter? It will be unregistered and removed from the adapter store.
